sentence: The report, ______ by the committee, was published yesterday.
explanation: Se usa un participio pasado (<written>) para crear una cláusula pasiva reducida que modifica al sustantivo <report>.
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.

sentence: Having ______ the book, he knew the movie's ending.
explanation: Se usa un participio perfecto (<Having read>) para indicar que una acción se completó antes que la otra.
tip: 'Having + past participle' shows one action completed before another.

sentence: All the tickets for the concert had already been ______.
explanation: Se necesita el participio pasado del verbo <sell> (sold) para la voz pasiva en pluscuamperfecto (<had been sold>).
tip: Choose between present participle (-ing) and past participle (-ed/irregular) based on active vs. passive meaning.

sentence: I was very ______ in the story he told.
explanation: Se usa el participio pasado (-ed) para describir un sentimiento o emoción. <Interested> describe cómo me sentía.
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.

sentence: The movie was so ______, I fell asleep.
explanation: Se usa el participio presente (-ing) para describir la característica de algo o alguien que causa un sentimiento. La película era aburrida.
tip: The -ing form can show cause, time, or a simultaneous action.

sentence: ______ by the noise, the baby started to cry.
explanation: Un participio pasado se usa al principio de una cláusula para indicar la razón (pasiva) de la acción principal.
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.

sentence: The man ______ the newspaper is my father.
explanation: Un participio presente se usa para reducir una cláusula adjetiva ('The man who is <reading>...').
tip: The -ing form can show cause, time, or a simultaneous action.

sentence: She felt ______ after the long journey.
explanation: El participio pasado (-ed) se usa para describir cómo se siente una persona.
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.

sentence: The results were ______.
explanation: El participio presente (-ing) se usa para describir la cualidad de algo que causa un sentimiento.
tip: The -ing form can show cause, time, or a simultaneous action.

sentence: Having ______ his homework, he went out to play.
explanation: El participio perfecto (<Having finished>) muestra que la primera acción se completó antes de la segunda.
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.

sentence: The car, ______ in Germany, is very reliable.
explanation: Cláusula de participio pasado para dar más información sobre el sustantivo ('The car which was <made>...').
tip: Choose between present participle (-ing) and past participle (-ed/irregular) based on active vs. passive meaning.

sentence: I find this subject very ______.
explanation: El participio presente (-ing) describe la característica que provoca el sentimiento de confusión.
tip: The -ing form can show cause, time, or a simultaneous action.

sentence: The students ______ for the exam felt nervous.
explanation: Cláusula de participio presente para modificar <students> ('The students who were studying...').
tip: The -ing form can show cause, time, or a simultaneous action.

sentence: The letter ______ yesterday contained good news.
explanation: Cláusula de participio pasado para modificar <letter> ('The letter that was received...').
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.

sentence: He was ______ by the film's special effects.
explanation: El participio pasado (-ed) describe la emoción o sentimiento de una persona.
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.

sentence: The speech ______ by the president was inspiring.
explanation: Cláusula de participio pasado en función adjetival ('The speech that was <given>...').
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.

sentence: Feeling ______, she went to bed early.
explanation: Una cláusula de participio presente al inicio de la oración para describir el estado del sujeto.
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.

sentence: The problem, ______ for hours, remained unsolved.
explanation: Participio pasado para una cláusula pasiva reducida.
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.

sentence: The ______ child held his mother's hand.
explanation: El participio pasado <frightened> funciona como un adjetivo para describir el estado del niño.
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.

sentence: This is a very ______ book.
explanation: El participio presente <entertaining> funciona como un adjetivo para describir la cualidad del libro.
tip: The -ing form can show cause, time, or a simultaneous action.

sentence: The ______ news left everyone shocked.
explanation: El participio presente (-ing) describe la cualidad de algo que causa un sentimiento.
tip: The -ing form can show cause, time, or a simultaneous action.

explanation: El participio pasado (-ed) describe un sentimiento o emoción.
tip: A past participle describes a completed action or passive meaning.
